description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build, Check, and Test that runs on both push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macOS-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install pipenv, cache dependencies using a custom cache action, install dependencies if the cache miss, and then run lint, codestyle, and docstyle checks using flake8, pycodestyle, and pydocstyle.
